plain_truth: This exports transition evidence for the currently exported quotient graph under existing caps. It does not by itself prove all 578 parent-local quotient graphs unless covers_all_parent_batch_graphs is true.

scope_notes.meaning: PASS_QUOTIENT_TRANSITION_TABLE means the replayed transition table has no internal conflicts or mixed outcomes under current caps. covers_all_parent_batch_graphs must also be true for a full quotient abstraction pass.
